errors.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email address before signing in.
errors.accountDeactivated: Your account has been deactivated. Contact support.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.subtitle: Start booking outdoor activities
signUp.verifyEmailBody: We've sent a verification link to your email. Please click it to activate your account.
signUp.successMessage: We've sent a verification link to {{email}}. Please click it to activate your account.
signUp.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, one uppercase letter and one number

verifyEmail.successBody: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.errorBody: The link is invalid or has expired.
verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.errorMessage: The link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

resetPassword.requestSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
resetPassword.requestSuccess: If an account exists for {{email}}, a reset link has been sent.
resetPassword.resetSuccess: Password updated! You can now sign in.

profile.passwordHint: Your password must be at least 8 characters and contain an uppercase letter and a number.
profile.signOutDesc: Sign out of your account on this device.

errors.sessionRequired: You need to be signed in to access this page.

registerOrg.title: Register Your Organization
registerOrg.subtitle: Submit your organization details for review. Once approved, you can list your outdoor activity spots.

fields.name: Organization Name
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell us about your organization, the activities you offer, and your location...

registerOrg.successBody: Thank you! We've received your organization registration and will review it within 1–3 business days. You'll receive an email at the address you provided once a decision has been made.
registerOrg.ctaLink: Offer outdoor activities? Register your organization →
